---
title: "CV"
---

::: {.content-shell}
::: {.cv-intro}
I am trained in human geography, with research interests in scientific mobility, regional innovation, urban networks, and empirical work using longitudinal relational data. This page provides a concise overview; the public PDF contains the full CV.
:::

::: {.cv-download}
::: {.cv-download-copy}
## Curriculum Vitae

Public CV in PDF format.
:::

[Download CV](assets/cv/Ran_Wang_CV_Public.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

## Education

::: {.summary-grid}
::: {.summary-card}
### East China Normal University

M.Sc. in Human Geography, 2023-2026. School of Geographic Sciences; economic geography and regional innovation.
:::

::: {.summary-card}
### Northeast Normal University

B.Sc. in Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, 2019-2023. Training in quantitative geography, GIS applications, urban geography, regional analysis, and planning.
:::
:::

## Research Outputs

::: {.summary-list}
- **Spatial Structure and Determinants of Top Global Biomedical Scientists' Mobility from an Urban Network Perspective** — accepted article.
- **Intercity Mobility Network of Top Global Biomedical Scientists: A Dual Perspective of Whole and Ego Networks** — master's thesis.
- **Author-Institution Linkage and Geocoding Feasibility Audit** — public code repository.
:::

## Methods and Skills

::: {.summary-list}
Python; R; Stata; GIS; social network analysis; ego-network analysis; conditional logit models; ERGM/WERGM; entity resolution; longitudinal multi-source data construction; coverage audits.
:::
:::
